vue-components.name: ADrawer
vue-components.description:
Wrapper interfaces for the toolkit's drawer components. Each `A*` component
forwards props to its `vaul-vue` / `reka-ui` parent unchanged, so each
interface extends the upstream shape 1:1. The `interface … extends` form
(instead of a `type` alias) lets consumers declaration-merge to add custom
props later without a breaking export rename.

props.name: closeThreshold
props.description:
Number between 0 and 1 that determines when the drawer should be closed.
Example: threshold of 0.5 would close the drawer if the user swiped for 50% of the height of the drawer or more.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Opened by default, skips initial enter animation. Still reacts to `open` state changes

props.name: direction
props.description: Direction of the drawer. Can be `top` or `bottom`, `left`, `right`.

props.name: dismissible
props.description:
When `false` dragging, clicking outside, pressing esc, etc. will not close the drawer.
Use this in combination with the `open` prop, otherwise you won't be able to open/close the drawer.

props.name: fadeFromIndex
props.description: Index of a `snapPoint` from which the overlay fade should be applied. Defaults to the last snap point.

props.name: fixed
props.description: When `true`, don't move the drawer upwards if there's space, but rather only change it's height so it's fully scrollable when the keyboard is open

props.name: handleOnly
props.description: When `true` only allows the drawer to be dragged by the `<Drawer.Handle />` component.

props.name: modal
props.description: When `false` it allows to interact with elements outside of the drawer without closing it.

props.name: noBodyStyles
props.description: When `true` the `body` doesn't get any styles assigned from Vaul

props.name: scrollLockTimeout
props.description: Duration for which the drawer is not draggable after scrolling content inside of the drawer.

props.name: setBackgroundColorOnScale
props.description: When `false` we don't change body's background color when the drawer is open.

props.name: snapPoints
props.description:
Array of numbers from 0 to 100 that corresponds to % of the screen a given snap point should take up.
Should go from least visible. Example `[0.2, 0.5, 0.8]`.
You can also use px values, which doesn't take screen height into account.

events.name: animationEnd
events.description:
Gets triggered after the open or close animation ends, it receives an `open` argument with the `open` state of the drawer by the time the function was triggered.
Useful to revert any state changes for example.

props.name: as
props.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwritten by `asChild`.

props.name: asChild
props.description:
Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

Read our [Composition](https://www.reka-ui.com/docs/guides/composition) guide for more details.

props.name: as
props.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwritten by `asChild`.

props.name: asChild
props.description:
Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

Read our [Composition](https://www.reka-ui.com/docs/guides/composition) guide for more details.

props.name: disableOutsidePointerEvents
props.description:
When `true`, hover/focus/click interactions will be disabled on elements outside
the `DismissableLayer`. Users will need to click twice on outside elements to
interact with them: once to close the `DismissableLayer`, and again to trigger the element.

props.name: forceMount
props.description:
Used to force mounting when more control is needed. Useful when
controlling animation with Vue animation libraries.

events.name: closeAutoFocus
events.description:
Event handler called when auto-focusing on close.
Can be prevented.

events.name: escapeKeyDown
events.description:
Event handler called when the escape key is down.
Can be prevented.

events.name: focusOutside
events.description:
Event handler called when the focus moves outside of the `DismissableLayer`.
Can be prevented.

events.name: interactOutside
events.description:
Event handler called when an interaction happens outside the `DismissableLayer`.
Specifically, when a `pointerdown` event happens outside or focus moves outside of it.
Can be prevented.

events.name: openAutoFocus
events.description:
Event handler called when auto-focusing on open.
Can be prevented.

events.name: pointerDownOutside
events.description:
Event handler called when a `pointerdown` event happens outside of the `DismissableLayer`.
Can be prevented.

props.name: as
props.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwritten by `asChild`.

props.name: asChild
props.description:
Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

Read our [Composition](https://www.reka-ui.com/docs/guides/composition) guide for more details.

props.name: forceMount
props.description:
Used to force mounting when more control is needed. Useful when
controlling animation with Vue animation libraries.
